description:
Deep antagonistic quality review of `hx-checkbox` (T1-09). 6/6 libraries ship this.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-checkbox/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, indeterminate state typing, form value/checked typing, ElementInternals
2. Accessibility — `role="checkbox"`, `aria-checked` (true/false/mixed for indeterminate), keyboard (Space to toggle), label association, group context with `aria-describedby`, axe-core pass
3. Tests — checked/unchecked/indeterminate states, form association, disabled state, label click activates checkbox, programmatic state changes
4. Storybook — all states, indeterminate demo, form integration demo
5. CSS — custom checkbox mark rendering, focus ring, `--hx-*` tokens, CSS parts (checkbox, label, checkmark)
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — form-associated, Twig-renderable

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-checkbox/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-checkbox — T1-09 antagonistic quality review
